name: flour tortillas
instructions: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 1.5 tsp baking powder, 1.5 tsp kosher salt, 3 tbsp lard or vegetable shortening, 3/4 cup water.
notes: tried a similar recipe with a larger flour-to-salt ratio (3 cups flour to 1.5 tsp salt) and it wasn't salty enough. tried vegetable oil instead of shortening and it was bad. this recipe seems to correct both.
